revision.comment: Category:14th-century BC beginnings
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{EstablishmentsInCenturyBC|13|14th|15th|13th}} The 14th century BC is the time period from the year [[:en:1400 BC|1400 BC]] to [[:en:1301 BC|1301 BC]]. {{category see also if exists|14th-century BC disestablishments}} {{draft categories|
}} [[Category:14th-century BC beginnings|Establishments]] [[Category:2nd-millennium BC establishments|-6]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Establishments by century|-86]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:14th-century BC establishments]] [[en:Category:14th-century BC establishments]] [[Category:14th-century BC beginnings|Establishments]] [[Category:2nd-millennium BC establishments|-6]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Establishments by century|-86]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=14th-century_BC_establishments here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{EstablishmentsInCenturyBC|13|14th|15th|13th}} {{category see also if exists|14th-century BC disestablishments}} {{wikidata link|Q16761708}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:14th-century BC establishments]] [[en:Category:14th-century BC establishments]] <!--categories--> [[Category:14th-century BC beginnings|Establishments]] [[Category:2nd-millennium BC establishments|-6]] [[Category:Establishments by century|-86]]
